title: Amaranthium (Valentines)
description:
Just adds some love-themed items (2 weapons, and an item)
A weapon that Strikes your opponent in love.
And one that breaks their heart...

(Don't toy with people's emotions in the real world and over messages though, that is just mean.)
body:
Just adds two weapons, two bosses, four items, a block, and an effect.
- Heart Piercer
- Heart Breaker
- Infectus Mecchanicus
- Wasp Queen
- Infected Insignia
- Scrapped Arm
- Royal Stinger
- Heart Quartz
- Angry Hive Block
- Lovestruck


The Heart Piercer Applies the "Lovestruck" Effect on Creatures.
The Heart Breaker Deals an Additional 9 Damage to "Lovestruck" Creatures.

"Lovestruck"
- Effect:
- Creature Regenerates Health Quicker (Regeneration), But is Weakened (Weakness).

Anyone who wants to make an addon for this mod can if they wish.
